{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Flame-Gift
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Flame-Gift]] is a warband of the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Flame-Gift]] is one of the eight wandering mercenary armies in the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
